message:
fix(command): add CLUSTER GETKEYSINSLOT and COUNTKEYSINSLOT to HELP output

Add CLUSTER GETKEYSINSLOT <slot> <count> and CLUSTER COUNTKEYSINSLOT
<slot> entries to the CLUSTER HELP response in both the command dispatch
layer (fr-command) and the runtime layer (fr-runtime), including the
runtime's expected-output test fixture.

Add a dedicated test in fr-command confirming both subcommands appear in
the CLUSTER HELP array.

Also applies rustfmt formatting cleanup to the runtime special-command
match arms (single-line closures that no longer need braces).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
